mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 forward returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: When policy rates are pinned near zero and payrolls are expanding, the combination signals cheap discount rates plus improving cash-flow expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.5 and PAYEMS increases over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS below 0.5 and rising PAYEMS state does not outperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A material decline in industrial production signals weakening output, inventory correction, and lower operating leverage, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls by more than 1.0 percent over 6 months
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 6-month declines greater than 1.0 percent are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or have no negative return differential.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts crossing above their trailing trend signals improving construction activity and durable-goods demand, raising cyclical earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its trailing 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upward crossings do not generate higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-crossing months, or if the triggered hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices alongside rising policy rates signals tightening financial conditions and margin pressure, reducing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation accelerates by more than 0.5 percentage points over 3 months and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-acceleration and FEDFUNDS-rise condition is not associated with below-average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if the interaction term is nonnegative in rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales contraction while payrolls keep expanding signals a demand shortfall despite rising labor costs, compressing margins and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls over 3 months while PAYEMS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS-down and PAYEMS-up observations do not produce lower 5-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional returns, or if the triggered downside hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth above its trailing 4-quarter pace signals broad demand acceleration and stronger aggregate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter growth rate crosses above its trailing 4-quarter growth rate
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth crossings above trend are not followed by above-average 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if rolling 5-year Rank IC is below 0.03 after accounting for publication lags.
